title: Pediatric General Practitioner
rawText: We are hiring a Pediatric General Practitioner in Abu Dhabi for a full-time role in an outpatient medical center. The doctor will assess pediatric patients, diagnose and manage common childhood illnesses, provide follow-up plans, and coordinate referrals when needed. Candidates should have prior GP experience, pediatric background, excellent communication skills, and a valid DOH license.

title: General Practitioner - Pediatrics
rawText: A medical clinic in Dubai is looking for a General Practitioner with pediatric experience. The role includes evaluating children, managing common pediatric conditions, counseling families, and coordinating referrals. DHA license is preferred.
